title: The Man Company Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: The Man Company Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with The Man Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About The Man Company Digital Technologies:
The Man Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company Digital Technologies!
